activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identification via presence in invoice text (Koncernstruktur)
Legal company form abbreviation normalization for consignor
Consignee prioritization: Invoice to / Bill to first
EU origin normalization for Country of Origin

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' from certificate matches exactly the issuer company name and VAT information in the invoice including abbreviation normalization of legal form. The name is found explicitly in multiple locations in invoice text including header and address blocks, with matching country Sweden.

consignee.certificate_value: Döktas Dökümcülük Tic. ve San. A.S
consignee.invoice_value: Döktas Dökümcülük Tic. ve San. A.S
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Döktas Dökümcülük Tic. ve San. A.S' from certificate exactly matches invoice 'Payer' and 'Delivery address' fields including address lines and country Turkey, fulfilling prioritization of primary invoice fields for consignee verification.

goods_description.certificate_value: 6 pallets Fasteners M14x90 STUD 8.8 Zi/NiB Stat no 73181588
goods_description.invoice_value: 6 pallets Fasteners M14x90 STUD 8.8 Zi/NiB Stat no 73181588 Screws, with head, hexagon, class >=8.8
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate matches invoice line item description exactly, including quantity, item description and customs statistic number. Additional detail 'Screws, with head...' in invoice is considered acceptable additional info, not causing mismatch.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 1674 kg Gross from certificate is exactly confirmed by invoice total gross weight 1674 kg. Unit and weight category match, fulfilling quantity verification rules.

origin.motivation: Country of origin 'Sweden' from certificate is explicitly stated in the invoice in the origin field as 'SE' (ISO code for Sweden). EU normalization applies and origin is matched explicitly in invoice.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match between Certificate of Origin and Invoice with consistent company names, consignee, product descriptions, quantities, and origins after normalization.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
